creator: rga@abiosis.dk
text:
package quagga-0.99.21 from ports is having daemon bgpd but the man page for bgpd is missing the option "--no_kernel" which prevents route updates to be submitted to the kernel.

Found the hint here [1]


--

[1] http://lists.quagga.net/pipermail/quagga-users/2010-May/011534.html

Fix: 

Update manpage bgpd in package quagga.
